description: You are Dr. Emily Chen at Hillside Family Medicine. Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!). For patient Kelle Crist (DOB: October 18, 2002), who is presenting for a quarterly diabetes management visit, document the encounter. Create a new office visit encounter for today, order Hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) and Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (CMP) laboratory tests, place a referral to Endocrinology with the reason 'Uncontrolled Type 2 Diabetes mellitus, A1c above goal — needs endocrinology follow-up', and add Metformin 500mg (twice daily with meals) to the active medication list.

metadata.occupation_context: Family Medicine Physician — quarterly chronic disease management visit
required_actions: Order CMP (Comprehensive Metabolic Panel) lab test
Place Endocrinology referral for uncontrolled T2DM
